action_set_definitions.name: get_student_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the student including mastery levels, engagement, fatigue_index, and history. Use this to monitor cognitive load and progress.

action_set_definitions.name: list_available_content
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all available module IDs and assessment IDs within the curriculum to identify specific targets for assignment.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns an educational intervention. 'scaffolding' reduces cognitive load and fixes syntax; 'remediation' addresses prerequisite gaps; 'practice' builds fluency.

module_id.description: The ID of the module to assign.

intervention_type.description: The pedagogical approach to use for this assignment.

action_set_definitions.name: schedule_rest
action_set_definitions.description: Reduces the student's fatigue_index through a recovery period.

break_type.description: Short breaks provide minor recovery; long breaks provide significant recovery.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_assessment
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers an assessment for the student. Essential for measuring if the 0.90 mastery goal is reached.

assessment_id.description: The ID of the assessment to administer.

state_description.mastery_profile: A map of topic IDs to numeric mastery levels (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.engagement_level: Current student focus and engagement score (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.fatigue_index: Accumulated cognitive load; affects performance on quizzes (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.completed_modules: List of module IDs the student has successfully completed.
state_description.session_history: Log of recent actions and outcomes for context maintenance.

session_history: Action: present_lesson(gcf_01) -> Result: Mastery unchanged (Concept already known)
System Alert: High Latency / High Accuracy mismatch detected in step 1
